chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 747 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For direction For hearing of CMA No.7295/2023 (C/A) 26.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan along with Nadeem Ashraf Senior Superintendent and SIP Aadarsh Ahmed of Motorways >>>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned DAG has drawn Court’s attention to the statement filed by him in compliance of the order passed by this Court dated 27.04.2022 along with reasons have also been given as to why the petitioner was superseded from promotion so he has relied upon the Judgment of Honourable Supreme Court rendered in the case as 2022 SCMR 1770 wherein the relevant para No.12 and 17 are reproduced. We are hearing the contempt application at the moment against the said order and we are of the view that the department has fully complied with our said order, if petitioner still has the grievance, he would have the remedy in accordance with law to challenge the findings of the Departmental Promotion Committee. The Contempt is not made, the application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
